name: Mass Assignment Vulnerability
description: Detects direct binding of raw HTTP request bodies to domain objects or ORM entities without an explicit allow-list, allowing attackers to set privileged fields such as isAdmin or role.

examples.before:
# Binds all request fields including isAdmin, role, balance
user = User(**request.get_json())
db.session.add(user)
examples.after:
# Allow-list only safe, user-supplied fields via a schema
schema = UserCreateSchema(only=["username", "email", "password"])
user = User(**schema.load(request.get_json()))
db.session.add(user)
